body:
Features: * Adds a CMake option `-DPACKAGES_REMOVE_DISABLED` to remove detection code of disabled packages (`-DPACKAGES_DISABLE_`) for slightly smaller binary size (Packages) Bugfixes: * Fixes compatibility issues with Lua 5.3 * Avoid possible infinite recursion in `encode_json` when encoding deeply nested tables or circular references * Fixes compilation issues when building with old macOS SDKs ---
